arts.ttl: James Maddison sends heartfelt Coventry City message after homecoming with Tottenham Hotspur
arts.sum: James Maddison has taken to social media after helping knock boyhood club Coventry City out of the Carabao Cup, paying tribute to his 'home' with a message of good luck for the season. His quick progression through to the senior side has been a repetitive theme throughout his career as it was by the age of 19 he had been picked up by fellow Championship side Norwich City, two years after that he jumped to the Premier League with Leicester City and for the past two seasons he has been able to try his hand at a 'Big Six' club in Tottenham Hotspur.

arts.ttl: Coventry vs Swansea predictions: Sky Blues to bounce back with a win
arts.sum: Coventry host Championship rivals Swansea at the CBS Arena on Saturday and Dan Childs expects the home side to collect all three points.

arts.ttl: ‘Routine victory’ – Coventry City vs Swansea City prediction: The72
arts.sum: The72's writers offer their Coventry City vs Swansea City prediction ahead of their Championship clash on Saturday afternoon. The post ‘Routine victory’ – Coventry City vs Swansea City prediction: The72 appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: 'Love it': James Maddison raves about £20m Tottenham player who shone against Coventry
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur were able to give their fans something to cheer about by the end of their League Cup meeting with Coventry City on Wednesday...

arts.ttl: Mark Robins says Tottenham have a truly 'top player' in their ranks that Coventry struggled to deal with last night
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur managed to claim victory from the jaws of defeat on Wednesday night as they went through to the fourth round of the League...
Aaron Ashley has taken a look at all of this weekend's Championship matches and provided a score prediction for each game.

arts.ttl: Tottenham fans reveal concern for Brennan Johnson after noticing his response to scoring winner against Coventry - after Spurs youngster suffered abuse online and withdrew from Instagram
arts.sum: Supporters have been posting sympathetic messages in response after the forward deleted his Instagram account following a slew of anonymous abuse.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou confirms 'significant' Tottenham injury blow after Coventry scare
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur manager Ange Postecoglou has admitted winger Wilson Odobert looks to have suffered a "fairly significant" injury. Odobert wasn't the only casualty from the game as Spurs also lost fellow winger Timo Werner to injury during the late stages of the second half.
